heading_content_part: Privacy PolicyPrivacy PolicyMonday 25 February 2019Dragster Production (We, Us, Our) prioritise and respects the privacy for app users. We take user privacy seriously therefore, this privacy statement hereinafter developed for app users. This policy explains all aspects about how we collect, use and protect information about utilisation and retention of data.

Please take a few moments to read this privacy statement for your understanding that by installing and giving permissions to use this app services means you are using app services with your consent to the terms and conditions of this privacy policy.
Terms & ConditionsFollowing Terms & Conditions are explained about what information we get and why:
PERSONAL INFORMATION:

decoder_heading: Personal data means information through which a person is identifiable;
ident_heading: Personal data means information through which a person is identifiable;
heading_content_part: Personal data means information through which a person is identifiable;

decoder_heading: We do not collect retain or share such information.
ident_heading: we do not collect retain or share such information.
heading_content_part: we do not collect retain or share such information.Our app only access required information after user permission for proper functionality of app. This information is only used by this app to provide better user experience on content for user engagement.

decoder_heading: Dragster Production may collect non personal information to use in following circumstances:

decoder_heading: In order to have a better understanding for user behaviour, to resolve issues and problems in this app services, to improve this app, services and for advertisements.
ident_heading: In order to have a better understanding for user behaviour, to resolve issues and problems in this app services, to improve this app, services and for advertisements.
heading_content_part: In order to have a better understanding for user behaviour, to resolve issues and problems in this app services, to improve this app, services and for advertisements.Non personal information data requirements may include detail about installed application name and package name, the data of installed apps, frequency of the usage, country location, tools and station.
NO LOGIN INFORMATIONWe do not collect, upload or share information like app user name, date of birth or passwords through this app.
SECURITY OF INFORMATION

decoder_heading: We are committed to secure all information of app users.
ident_heading: We are committed to secure all information of app users.
heading_content_part: We are committed to secure all information of app users.

decoder_heading: Thus we strive continuously to use commercially acceptable measures to protect and secure it.
ident_heading: Thus we strive continuously to use commercially acceptable measures to protect and secure it.
heading_content_part: Thus we strive continuously to use commercially acceptable measures to protect and secure it. Keep in consideration that all information is not fully secure over the internet. We therefore suggest not to share your personal information unless it is necessarily required to fulfil your own personal purposes.

decoder_heading: We are not directly associated to any third party.
ident_heading: We are not directly associated to any third party.
heading_content_part: We are not directly associated to any third party.

decoder_heading: We never share partial or whole information to any third party through which you can be identified personally.
ident_heading: We never share partial or whole information to any third party through which you can be identified personally.
heading_content_part: We never share partial or whole information to any third party through which you can be identified personally.Functions of this app are designed for app user’s personal purpose only. While a user uses app, we do not access collect or share personal information to third parties.

COOKIES

decoder_heading: Cookies are small amount of data commonly used as unique identifiers.
ident_heading: Cookies are small amount of data commonly used as unique identifiers.
heading_content_part: Cookies are small amount of data commonly used as unique identifiers.

decoder_heading: These are sent from websites that you visit.
ident_heading: These are sent from websites that you visit.
heading_content_part: These are sent from websites that you visit. These cookies stored in internal memory of your device.These “Cookies” are not used by this service unambiguously. You can disable cookies.
PERMISSIONS
ACCESS_NETWORK_STATEThis permission allow us to access information about network.
ACCESS WIFIIt is necessary to access local network and internet connection for advertisement.
READ_WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE:This permission is required to access phone storage and to make changes into user’s device storage.
CAMERA:This permission allow our apps to take photos by user’s device camera. To help you access and use camera to take pictures, record Video.
Bluetooth:This permission is required to send and receive information to clone phone.
Access Location:This permission is required to access device location to show nearby available devices.
SMS Permission:1) Read SMS2) Write SMS3)Receive SMSWe only need these permissions for making default sms app to restore sms backups
UPDATE IN PRIVACY POLICYOur policy may update or change from time to time. Such changes be reflected at the top of changes in privacy policy so that it may easily be reviewed by users.
